channel.title: Gaming Culture on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Gaming Culture on MinWeb

item.title: How a Viral $40 Huntress Cosplay Redefined Body Positivity
item.description:
Have you ever wanted to dress up as your favorite video game character, but stopped yourself because you felt you didn’t “look the part”? Maybe you were worried your budget wasn’t big enough or that your body type didn’t match the character design. You aren’t alone.

But one of the most successful cosplays on the internet recently cost less than a fancy dinner for two and completely ignored the “traditional” rules of costume design.

item.title: Any Update Is a Bonus': Devs Push Back on Player Demands
item.description:
We’re living in the era of the “forever game.” From massive online shooters to sprawling survival titles, we’ve been conditioned to expect a steady, unending drip-feed of content. If a game launches today, we assume it will be supported, expanded, and tweaked for the next decade.

But what happens when the game is actually finished? You pay a fair price for a complete experience, only to find players demanding that developers never move on to anything else. Honestly, it’s a bit exhausting to watch.
